kit.name: OpenClaw Enhancement & Compatibility Kit
kit.tagline: A governance, compatibility, and runtime enhancement layer for OpenClaw, Claude, and Codex.
kit.tagline_zh: 一个面向 OpenClaw、Claude、Codex 的治理、兼容、运行时增强层。

skills.title: Behavior Analyzer
skills.summary: Session health analysis and anomaly detection.
skills.summary_zh: 会话健康分析与异常检测。

skills.title: Cache Monitor
skills.summary: Static and dynamic prompt layer cache drift monitoring.
skills.summary_zh: 静态与动态提示层缓存漂移监控。

skills.title: Compact Guardian
skills.summary: Circuit breaker and recovery flow for failed compactions.
skills.summary_zh: 面向压缩失败场景的熔断与恢复流程。

skills.title: Evolve
skills.summary: Rule extraction from reflections and learnings.
skills.summary_zh: 从反思与学习记录中提炼规则。

skills.title: Fusion Engine
skills.summary: Multi-source context fusion for decision support.
skills.summary_zh: 面向决策支持的多源上下文融合。

skills.title: Knowledge Federation
skills.summary: Rule sharing, federation, and long-term optimization.
skills.summary_zh: 规则共享、联邦协同与长期优化。

skills.title: Memory Compaction
skills.summary: Memory pruning, merging, and optional lossless backends.
skills.summary_zh: 记忆裁剪、合并与可选无损后端。

skills.title: Rule Optimizer
skills.summary: Effectiveness scoring and A/B rule refinement.
skills.summary_zh: 规则效果评分与 A/B 精炼。

skills.title: Safe Command Execution
skills.summary_zh: 基于 AST 的 shell 命令安全检查。

skills.title: Smart Compact
skills.summary: Session compaction strategy and transcript rewriting.
skills.summary_zh: 会话压缩策略与转录重写。

skills.title: YOLO Permissions
skills.summary: Command risk scoring and permission classification.
skills.summary_zh: 命令风险评分与权限分类。

adapters.summary: Native OpenClaw plugin metadata and bundle output.
adapters.summary_zh: OpenClaw 原生插件元数据与 bundle 产物。

adapters.summary: Claude-compatible bundle manifest and command roots.
adapters.summary_zh: Claude 兼容 bundle manifest 与命令根目录。

adapters.summary: Codex-compatible bundle manifest and hook packs.
adapters.summary_zh: Codex 兼容 bundle manifest 与 hook 包。

adapters.summary: Optional context preservation backend for compaction workflows.
adapters.summary_zh: 用于压缩流程的可选上下文保真后端。

adapters.summary: Structured event exporter with optional Opik/Langfuse bridges.
adapters.summary_zh: 结构化事件导出接口，可选接 Opik/Langfuse。

adapters.summary: Optional temporal memory interface with local stub implementation.
adapters.summary_zh: 可选时序记忆接口，默认提供本地 stub。
可选远程沙箱 provider 接口。

modes.summary: Planning and scoping with bounded execution.
Review-only mode for code and policy checks.
Automated execution with policy gates and sandbox providers.
